definicao:
SELECT id,
    name,
    code,
    created_at,
    updated_at
   FROM units
  ORDER BY name;
comentario: View pública de todas as unidades disponíveis no sistema

definicao:
WITH exception_codes AS (
         SELECT unnest(ARRAY['ibirite'::text, 'pousoalegre001'::text, 'cabofrio001'::text, 'varginha001'::text, 'trescoracoes001'::text, 'portoalegre001'::text]) AS code
        ), periodo AS (
         SELECT date_trunc('month'::text, (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text)) AS inicio_mes,
            (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) AS agora,
            EXTRACT(day FROM (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text))::integer AS dia_atual,
            EXTRACT(day FROM date_trunc('month'::text, (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text)) + '1 mon -1 days'::interval)::integer AS dias_no_mes
        ), realizado_unit AS (
         SELECT p_1.unit_id,
            round(sum(p_1.valor) / 100::numeric, 2) AS valor_realizado
           FROM pagamentos p_1
             CROSS JOIN periodo periodo_1
          WHERE p_1.reembolso_realizado IS NOT TRUE AND (p_1.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) >= periodo_1.inicio_mes AND (p_1.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) <= periodo_1.agora
          GROUP BY p_1.unit_id
        ), unit_pct AS (
         SELECT u.id AS unit_id,
                CASE
                    WHEN (u.code IN ( SELECT exception_codes.code
                       FROM exception_codes)) THEN 7.0
                    WHEN periodo_1.dia_atual > 0 AND (COALESCE(r.valor_realizado, 0::numeric) / periodo_1.dia_atual::numeric * periodo_1.dias_no_mes::numeric) <= 15000::numeric THEN 10.0
                    WHEN periodo_1.dia_atual > 0 AND (COALESCE(r.valor_realizado, 0::numeric) / periodo_1.dia_atual::numeric * periodo_1.dias_no_mes::numeric) <= 30000::numeric THEN 9.0
                    WHEN periodo_1.dia_atual > 0 AND (COALESCE(r.valor_realizado, 0::numeric) / periodo_1.dia_atual::numeric * periodo_1.dias_no_mes::numeric) <= 45000::numeric THEN 8.0
                    ELSE 7.0
                END AS pct
           FROM units u
             LEFT JOIN realizado_unit r ON r.unit_id = u.id
             CROSS JOIN periodo periodo_1
        )
 SELECT EXTRACT(day FROM (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text))::integer AS dia,
    round(sum(p.valor) / 100::numeric, 2) AS valor_total,
    count(*)::integer AS qtd_pagamentos,
    round(sum(p.valor::numeric / 100::numeric * up.pct / 100::numeric), 2) AS comissao_total
   FROM pagamentos p
     JOIN unit_pct up ON up.unit_id = p.unit_id
     CROSS JOIN periodo
  WHERE p.reembolso_realizado IS NOT TRUE AND (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) >= periodo.inicio_mes AND (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) <= periodo.agora
  GROUP BY (EXTRACT(day FROM (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text)))
  ORDER BY (EXTRACT(day FROM (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text))::integer);

WITH periodo AS (
         SELECT date_trunc('month'::text, (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text)) AS inicio_mes,
            (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) AS agora
        )
 SELECT COALESCE(round(sum(p.valor) / 100::numeric, 2), 0::numeric) AS valor_total,
    count(*)::integer AS qtd_estornos
   FROM pagamentos p
     CROSS JOIN periodo
  WHERE p.reembolso_realizado = true AND (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) >= periodo.inicio_mes AND (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) <= periodo.agora;

WITH exception_codes AS (
         SELECT unnest(ARRAY['ibirite'::text, 'pousoalegre001'::text, 'cabofrio001'::text, 'varginha001'::text, 'trescoracoes001'::text, 'portoalegre001'::text]) AS code
        ), periodo AS (
         SELECT date_trunc('month'::text, (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text)) AS inicio_mes,
            (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) AS agora,
            EXTRACT(day FROM (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text))::integer AS dia_atual,
            EXTRACT(day FROM date_trunc('month'::text, (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text)) + '1 mon -1 days'::interval)::integer AS dias_no_mes
        ), realizado AS (
         SELECT p.unit_id,
            round(sum(p.valor) / 100::numeric, 2) AS valor_realizado,
            count(*)::integer AS qtd_pagamentos
           FROM pagamentos p
             CROSS JOIN periodo
          WHERE p.reembolso_realizado IS NOT TRUE AND (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) >= periodo.inicio_mes AND (p.data_pagamento AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'::text) <= periodo.agora
          GROUP BY p.unit_id
        ), com_projecao AS (
         SELECT u.id AS unit_id,
            u.name AS unit_name,
            u.code AS unit_code,
            COALESCE(r.valor_realizado, 0::numeric) AS valor_realizado,
            COALESCE(r.qtd_pagamentos, 0) AS qtd_pagamentos,
                CASE
                    WHEN periodo.dia_atual > 0 THEN round(COALESCE(r.valor_realizado, 0::numeric) / periodo.dia_atual::numeric * periodo.dias_no_mes::numeric, 2)
                    ELSE 0::numeric
                END AS valor_projetado,
            periodo.dia_atual,
            periodo.dias_no_mes
           FROM units u
             LEFT JOIN realizado r ON r.unit_id = u.id
             CROSS JOIN periodo
        )
 SELECT unit_id,
    unit_name,
    unit_code,
    valor_realizado,
    valor_projetado,
    qtd_pagamentos,
    dia_atual,
    dias_no_mes,
        CASE
            WHEN (unit_code IN ( SELECT exception_codes.code
               FROM exception_codes)) THEN 7.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 15000::numeric THEN 10.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 30000::numeric THEN 9.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 45000::numeric THEN 8.0
            ELSE 7.0
        END AS percentual_comissao,
    (unit_code IN ( SELECT exception_codes.code
           FROM exception_codes)) AS comissao_fixa,
    round(valor_realizado *
        CASE
            WHEN (unit_code IN ( SELECT exception_codes.code
               FROM exception_codes)) THEN 7.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 15000::numeric THEN 10.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 30000::numeric THEN 9.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 45000::numeric THEN 8.0
            ELSE 7.0
        END / 100::numeric, 2) AS comissao_realizada,
    round(valor_projetado *
        CASE
            WHEN (unit_code IN ( SELECT exception_codes.code
               FROM exception_codes)) THEN 7.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 15000::numeric THEN 10.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 30000::numeric THEN 9.0
            WHEN valor_projetado <= 45000::numeric THEN 8.0
            ELSE 7.0
        END / 100::numeric, 2) AS comissao_projetada
   FROM com_projecao cp
  ORDER BY valor_realizado DESC;

SELECT ml.unit_id,
    u.bi_name,
    count(*)::integer AS total_sent,
    round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE ml.status = ANY (ARRAY['delivered'::text, 'read'::text]))::numeric / NULLIF(count(*), 0)::numeric, 1) AS pct_delivered,
    round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE ml.status = 'failed'::text)::numeric / NULLIF(count(*), 0)::numeric, 1) AS pct_failed,
    round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE ml.status = 'read'::text)::numeric / NULLIF(count(*), 0)::numeric, 1) AS pct_read,
    round(avg(EXTRACT(epoch FROM ml.delivered_at - ml.sent_at)))::integer AS avg_delivery_secs,
    round(avg(EXTRACT(epoch FROM ml.read_at - ml.sent_at)))::integer AS avg_read_secs
   FROM message_log ml
     LEFT JOIN units u ON u.id = ml.unit_id
  WHERE ml.sent_at >= (now() - '24:00:00'::interval)
  GROUP BY ml.unit_id, u.bi_name;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (ph.phone_number_id) ph.phone_number_id,
    ph.unit_id,
    u.bi_name,
    u.name AS unit_name,
    u.code AS unit_code,
    ph.quality_rating,
    ph.status,
    ph.observed_at,
    ph.event,
    ph.current_limit
   FROM phone_health ph
     LEFT JOIN units u ON u.id = ph.unit_id
  ORDER BY ph.phone_number_id, ph.observed_at DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (tsl.template_name) tsl.template_name,
    tsl.status,
    tsl.category,
    tsl.created_at AS observed_at,
    ti.quality_score,
    ti.rejection_reason
   FROM template_status_log tsl
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT t.quality_score,
            t.rejection_reason
           FROM template_inventory t
          WHERE t.template_name = tsl.template_name
          ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) ti ON true
  WHERE tsl.template_name IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY tsl.template_name, tsl.created_at DESC;

SELECT unit_code,
    status,
    paused_by_sentinel,
    count(*)::integer AS total,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'UTILITY'::text)::integer AS utility,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'MARKETING'::text)::integer AS marketing
   FROM template_inventory ti
  GROUP BY unit_code, status, paused_by_sentinel;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (wc.waba_id) wc.waba_id,
    wc.unit_id,
    u.bi_name,
    u.name AS unit_name,
    wc.max_phone_numbers,
    wc.max_daily_conversations,
    wc.observed_at
   FROM waba_capability wc
     LEFT JOIN units u ON u.id = wc.unit_id
  ORDER BY wc.waba_id, wc.observed_at DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (wh.waba_id) wh.waba_id,
    wh.unit_id,
    u.bi_name,
    u.name AS unit_name,
    wh.name,
    wh.account_review_status,
    wh.business_verification_status,
    wh.health_status ->> 'can_send_message'::text AS can_send_message,
    wh.observed_at
   FROM waba_health wh
     LEFT JOIN units u ON u.id = wh.unit_id
  ORDER BY wh.waba_id, wh.observed_at DESC;

SELECT wv.id,
    wv.waba_id,
    wv.unit_id,
    u.bi_name,
    u.name AS unit_name,
    wv.event,
    wv.violation_type,
    wv.restriction_type,
    wv.restriction_expires_at,
    wv.ban_state,
    wv.affected_phone_number,
    wv.observed_at
   FROM waba_violations wv
     LEFT JOIN units u ON u.id = wv.unit_id
  ORDER BY wv.observed_at DESC;
